hooks.command: if echo "$FILEPATH" | grep -q '^tt/'; then cd $PROJECT_DIR && uv run --project tt ruff check --fix "$FILEPATH" 2>/dev/null; uv run --project tt ruff format "$FILEPATH" 2>/dev/null; fi; exit 0
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit'; then cd $PROJECT_DIR && make detect_rule_breaches 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; exit 0
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+push'; then echo 'NOTICE: pre-push hook will run rule compliance + lint checks.'; fi; exit 0
if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'scripts/merge\.sh'; then echo 'POST-MERGE: Run make evaluate_tt_ghostfolio to check test count.'; fi; exit 0
